description: Customer account master table in Oracle Trading Community Architecture. Each record represents a commercial customer account associated with a party and is used by Accounts Receivable to control billing relationships, account ownership, and customer transaction processing.

columns.name: CUST_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the customer account in Trading Community Architecture.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Trading Community Architecture party associated with the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence account nu.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: WH_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with wh update.

columns.name: ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE
columns.description: Reference to the originating source system record used during integration or conversion.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Current processing status of the transaction within the Oracle application flow.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control customer processing.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_CLASS_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying customer class for the record.

columns.name: PRIMARY_SALESREP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related primary salesrep record.

columns.name: SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying sales channel for the record.

columns.name: ORDER_TYPE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related order type record.

columns.name: PRICE_LIST_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related price list record.

columns.name: SUBCATEGORY_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying subcategory for the record.

columns.name: TAX_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying tax for the record.

columns.name: FOB_POINT
columns.description: Free On Board point that determines when ownership or shipping responsibility transfers.

columns.name: FREIGHT_TERM
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SHIP_PARTIAL
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SHIP_VIA
columns.description: Shipping method or carrier reference associated with the transaction or customer account.

columns.name: WAREHOUSE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the warehouse organization used for shipping or inventory processing.

columns.name: PAYMENT_TERM_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related payment term record.

columns.name: TAX_HEADER_LEVEL_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether tax header level applies to the record.

columns.name: TAX_ROUNDING_RULE
columns.description: Rounding adjustment associated with tax rounding rule.

columns.name: COTERMINATE_DAY_MONTH
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PRIMARY_SPECIALIST_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related primary specialist record.

columns.name: SECONDARY_SPECIALIST_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related secondary specialist record.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_LIABLE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether account liable applies to the record.

columns.name: RESTRICTION_LIMIT_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing restriction limit for the transaction.

columns.name: CURRENT_BALANCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PASSWORD_TEXT
columns.description: Detailed text associated with password.

columns.name: HIGH_PRIORITY_INDICATOR
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_ESTABLISHED_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with account established.

columns.name: CREDIT_CLASSIFICATION_CODE

columns.name: DEPARTMENT
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: MAJOR_ACCOUNT_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence major account nu.

columns.name: HOTWATCH_SERVICE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether hotwatch service applies to the record.

columns.name: HOTWATCH_SVC_BAL_IND
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: HELD_BILL_EXPIRATION_DATE

columns.name: GEO_CODE

columns.name: ACCT_LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS
columns.description: Status value showing the current processing state of acct life cycle.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with account.

columns.name: DEPOSIT_REFUND_METHOD
columns.description: Business attribute of the customer account used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DORMANT_ACCOUNT_FLAG

columns.name: NPA_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence npa nu.

columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence pin nu.

columns.name: SUSPENSION_DATE

columns.name: WRITE_OFF_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT

columns.name: SOURCE_CODE

columns.name: COMPETITOR_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control competitor processing.

columns.name: COMMENTS
columns.description: Free-text explanation entered to document the business purpose of the record.

business_questions: Show customer account details and account status.
Trace customer accounts to receivables transactions.
Find customer accounts for a party record.
Show billing accounts used for a specific customer transaction.
Identify customer accounts with recent invoice activity.
List customer accounts by account number or account name.
Display customer accounts by operating unit or business classification.
Find accounts associated with a specific bill-to customer reference.
